message:
chore: audit batch 407 — 8 files (~8,849L), all SOUND

Random exploration of interconnected modules:
- peekable.rs (318L): 3-state slot machine, proper size_hint
- fuzz.rs (737L): seed generation, minimization, regression corpus
- retry.rs (1251L): Idle→Sleeping→Polling state machine, exponential backoff
- timeout.rs (820L): late completions preserved, deadline minimization law
- barrier.rs (776L): cancel decrements arrived, leader election under lock
- budget.rs (1796L): meet semiring, INFINITE identity, saturating arithmetic
- hedge.rs (1317L): P99 NaN-safe, loser drop, deadline saturation
- load_balance.rs (1834L): LoadMetricGuard prevents in-flight leak, P2C/SWRR

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
